summary: Iteration 54 - 3-Phase Deep Testing Complete. Phase 1: 28/28 backend API tests passed. Phase 2: Redis caching verified on all endpoints. Phase 3: Mobile-first frontend at 360px and 320px viewports tested - minor horizontal overflow issue in header area.

issues: Horizontal overflow of 31px at 360px viewport caused by header elements (OFFLINE badge + coins balance). Elements with class 'flex items-center gap-2' extend to 391px. Consider adding 'flex-wrap' or 'overflow-hidden' to header container.

action_items: MINOR: Fix horizontal overflow in HomePage header at 360px viewport - add 'overflow-hidden' or 'flex-wrap' to header container (lines 154-188 in HomePage.jsx)
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 1 API Data Correctness: All 28 tests passed
Auth flow: check-phone → login → token format verified (nested token.access_token)
Matches smart sort: live first, upcoming ascending, completed descending - WORKING
All matches have start_time_ist field with IST format
Match info, contests, questions (16 with Hindi/English), predictions - all working
My Contests returns match.start_time_ist, match.venue - VERIFIED
Live Ticker has IST format (no GMT) - VERIFIED
Points Table has teams with wins/loss/matches - VERIFIED
Wallet balance, daily_streak, can_claim_daily - VERIFIED
Admin stats endpoint working
IPL players and records endpoints working (Redis cached 10min)
API root returns cache.status='connected' and cache.keys count
Pagination working with status filter
Phase 2 Redis Caching: All cache performance tests passed
Live ticker, match-info, questions, match-contests all cached properly
Redis stats: status=connected, keys>0, memory tracked
Phase 3 Mobile Frontend: 360px and 320px viewports tested
Live Now section at top - VERIFIED
Streak section visible - VERIFIED
Fantasy Points section visible - VERIFIED
IPL Table section visible - VERIFIED
Upcoming/Completed tabs working - VERIFIED
IST time format on match cards - VERIFIED
Bottom nav: 62px height (exceeds 44px minimum), 5 items visible
PredictionPage: 16 question dots scrollable, 4 options (A/B/C/D), sticky bottom nav
My Contests: Stats strip (Joined/Correct/Points), filter pills (All/Live/Open/Done)
320px viewport: No horizontal overflow, all elements fit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 completed comprehensive 3-phase testing. All backend APIs working correctly with Redis caching. Mobile frontend at 360px has minor horizontal overflow (31px) in header area caused by OFFLINE badge + coins balance display. At 320px viewport, no overflow detected. Key test data: Contest ID c5e299a7-d5c8-4ecc-9010-81964a60d0d4 (PBKS vs GT, live, 16 questions, 16/16 answered). Login response has nested token structure: data.token.access_token. Pagination works correctly with status filter (smart sort on page 1 without filter combines live+upcoming+completed).
